items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for minimum purchase requirements.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Minimum purchase requirements' but lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this requirement. The evidence provided does not include any details or examples of minimum purchase requirements being configured or utilized in the system, leading to an inconclusive result. The absence of such evidence indicates that the requirement cannot be validated at this time.
